# Blue Horizon Containers

> A global logistics provider specializing in high-quality new, used, and refurbished shipping containers.

Blue Horizon Containers operates a vast network ensuring cargo reaches its destination safely and efficiently. Founded over 30 years ago, we provide comprehensive supply chain solutions including transport, smart warehousing, and custom container fabrication.

## Key Services
- **Shipping Container Sales**: Dry containers, refrigerated containers, and custom modifications. Available in 20ft, 40ft, and other standard sizes.
- **Transport & Logistics**: Global network covering ocean freight, air freight, and road transport.
- **Smart Warehousing**: Highly secure, climate-controlled warehousing and storage facilities worldwide. Over 1,000,000 sqm of warehouse space.

## Pricing
For structured pricing and product options, please see [pricing.md](https://bluehorizoncontainerss.com/pricing.md). Custom quotes are available upon request.
